## Summary

Describe the change and why it is being made.

## Affected Files

List the files changed by this pull request.

## Alignment Check

- [ ] Templates, examples, and schemas were kept aligned
- [ ] Canonical field names were not changed, or any changes were documented
- [ ] Cross-links between artifacts were updated where needed

## Breaking Change

If checked, describe the compatibility impact and any required migration.

## Related Issue Or Discussion

Link the related issue, proposal, or discussion thread.

## Notes
